name: Hihimanu Sushi
tagline: High-end omakase sushi on Waialae — named for the Hawaiian eagle ray, blending island identity with Japanese craft.
talkStory: The name 'hihimanu' is Hawaiian for eagle ray or manta ray — a nice touch that blends Hawaiian identity with serious sushi craft. $100+ omakase in a local Kaimuki neighborhood setting, not Waikiki. The crowd is local sushi aficionados willing to pay for quality. Reserve ahead. Dinner only, opens at 2pm Tue–Sun.
